question:
Each rompus is nervous. Rompuses are jompuses. Jompuses are angry. Jompuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are earthy. Every tumpus is a numpus. Each numpus is not cold. Each numpus is an impus. Dumpuses are metallic. Impuses are dull. Each impus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are not opaque. Zumpuses are wumpuses. Every wumpus is blue. Wumpuses are vumpuses. Every vumpus is not metallic. Every vumpus is a yumpus. Sally is a numpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sally is not metallic.
